name: Ria Matsijs
description:
Why Ria may produce low-quality answers right now.

Ria Matsijs, your friendly counsellor and therapist. For those who can't afford a counsellor, psychologist, sexologist, or the like, and understand that AI bots can't replace real qualified professionals.

The older sister of Martha and Laz. (Strangely enough her siblings get very little traffic, even though the ratio of likes per chat or per message is much higher for them than for Ria.)
creator: sweet Tom
